items.title: App crashes on login
items.description: When I try to log in with my credentials, the app crashes immediately. This happens every time.

items.title: Add dark mode support
items.description: It would be great to have a dark mode option for the app to reduce eye strain.

items.title: Login crash on Android
items.description: The application crashes when attempting to authenticate. Tested on Android 12.

items.title: Export data to CSV
items.description: Need ability to export all data to CSV format for analysis in Excel.

items.title: How to reset password?
items.description: I can't find the password reset option. Where is it located?

items.title: Data export feature
items.description: Would like to export my data to CSV or Excel format.

items.title: Search results incomplete
items.description: Search only returns first 10 results even when there are more matches. Pagination broken.

items.title: Dark theme request
items.description: Please add dark mode to the application.

items.title: Critical: Production database connection failing
items.description: Production environment cannot connect to database. All users affected. Started 30 minutes ago.

items.title: Search pagination not working
items.description: When searching, only first page of results shows. Next button doesn't work.
